content:
🔹 Deadline: Students must submit an alternative text proposal by Week 10.
🔹 Format: 200-300 word proposal outlining:
• 📖 The chosen text and why they want to study it.
• 🔄 How it connects to the time period, themes, or ideas of that week.
• 🎯 At least two specific literary elements they will analyze.
• 📚 At least one secondary source or historical context they will use.
🔹 Instructor Review:
• I’ll provide approval, feedback, or suggestions for refining their selection.
• If rejected, I’ll recommend an alternative closer to the course framework.

✅ Why This Works:
• Prevents random selections while still giving freedom of choice.
• Ensures students make a case for their selection (instead of just picking a book at random).
• Encourages historical and literary context connections.

2️⃣ Should There Be an Optional Creative Component in the Final Project?
